_comment: Registration-completeness groups for tensor-grep. A tg-invented search flag must live in BOTH front doors: the native passthrough allow-list AND the Python bootstrap tg-only allow-list (a missed one leaks to ripgrep — the v1.15.0 --rank crash). 'entities' = the flags that MUST be in both; the lists otherwise legitimately differ. Seeded with the verified-in-both tg-invented flags; expand as new ones ship.

registration_groups.name: lsp-languages
registration_groups._comment: A supported LSP language must appear in BOTH the order list and the alias map; miss one -> a half-declared language. (Per-language SERVER coverage — _NODE_PACKAGE_SPECS / rust-analyzer — is a v1.1 check that needs package->language mapping.)
